title: Humpback vs the mega ramp
prompt_text: A whale-shaped object is positioned at the top of a large, orange mega ramp, seemingly preparing for a stunt. The event is labeled "LIVE MEGA RAMP FINALS" and takes place in an outdoor arena surrounded by a large crowd of spectators. In the background, a city skyline is visible under a clear, bright sky. The timestamp "12:33:21 PM" is displayed, indicating a daytime event.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A whale-shaped object is positioned at the top of a large, orange mega ramp, seemingly preparing for a stunt. The event is labeled "LIVE MEGA RAMP FINALS" and takes place in an outdoor arena surrounded by a large crowd of spectators. In the background, a city skyline is visible under a clear, bright sky. The timestamp "12:33:21 PM" is displayed, indicating a daytime event.

cinematography.mood: Exciting, action-packed, and slightly comical due to the unexpected participant.
cinematography.cameraShot: Dynamic, high-angle shots from multiple perspectives, including close-ups of the whale on the ramp and wide shots of the entire arena. The camera tracks the whale's movement down the ramp and into the air.

actions: A whale-shaped object starts at the top of a large orange ramp.
The whale slides down the ramp, gaining speed.
The whale becomes airborne after leaving the ramp's edge.
The whale performs a mid-air rotation.
The whale lands heavily on the next section of the ramp, causing a large splash of water or debris.
The whale slides down the last part of the ramp, creating more spray.
dialogue: Commentator 1: "Here we go, this as well. The whale is on course."
Commentator 2: "That's a humpback out of the gate, picking up speed."
Commentator 1: "He's airbone! Oh my God! He comes down heavy. Look out! Whoa!"
Commentator 2: "Straight into the crowd! People are bailing!"
